## Topics

### Strategy Sprint Overview

  - [Two types: Custom (e.g. Augment Code) and Editorial (e.g. Town)](https://fathom.video/share/zVCunXQxqQspyAni_GsZ6NpXFyG7mMSA?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

  - [Replacing previous pilot project approach](https://fathom.video/share/zVCunXQxqQspyAni_GsZ6NpXFyG7mMSA?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Clients sign long-term engagement but can opt-out after sprint](https://fathom.video/share/zVCunXQxqQspyAni_GsZ6NpXFyG7mMSA?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)
